title: Privacy Policy - DIGIT3ZE
intro: DIGIT3ZE is an ad-supported mobile game. This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected, used, and shared when you use the app.

paragraphs: We use certain data to provide and improve game features, including ads, in-app purchases, and leaderboard functionality.
list: Advertising data processed via Unity Ads
Purchase and restore data handled by Google Play / Apple App Store
Leaderboard and game profile data handled by Google Play Games / Apple Game Center
Local gameplay progress and settings stored on your device

paragraphs: The app may use third-party services with their own privacy policies:
list: Google Play Store / Apple App Store
Google Play Games / Apple Game Center

paragraphs: In case of app errors or diagnostics, technical log data may be collected, such as device model, operating system version, and event timestamps.

DIGIT3ZE is available for all ages (0+). We take privacy seriously for every user. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has shared personal information with us, contact us and we will review and delete relevant data when applicable.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised last-updated date.

contact.before: If you have any questions or suggestions regarding this Privacy Policy, contact us at
